Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mayra Chiquete Plaintiff in Pro Per
Rose-Ellen Heinz Fairgrieve, Deputy City Attorney, for the Defendant

Court, Counsel and Plaintiff in Pro Per are present in open court. Plaintiff in Pro Per and Defense Counsel present arguments to the court as to why the trial date in this matter should not be continued. The Court having heard all arguments, the Court finds good cause to GRANT the motion to continue. The trial date is continued to February 8, 2009 at 9:00 am in Department 206. Court stands adjourned. (220)
